introduced_concepts.name: Stationary Distribution
introduced_concepts.definition: A distribution that remains unchanged under the transition dynamics.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 在转移动力学下保持不变的概率分布。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The numerical value of the phenotype or quantitative trait being modeled.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表型或数量性状在模型中的数值。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 27.5 Count
introduced_concepts.definition: A discrete number of items, individuals, or events.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 27.5 Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter describing how quickly a process occurs.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 描述某个过程发生快慢的参数。

views.name: Gamma
views.definition: Ffect mutations tend to be fixed (and the population is said to be environmentally limited).
views.definition_zh: Gamma 是这条公式要读出的核心量；等号右侧说明它由哪些条件和符号共同决定。
views.formula_section: FISHER'S MODEL: THE ADAPTIVE GEOMETRY OF NEW MUTATIONS
views.formula_subsection: Adaptive Walks Under a Moving Optimum

introduced_concepts.name: Fitness Width
introduced_concepts.definition: A scale parameter controlling how quickly fitness declines away from the optimum.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 控制性状偏离最优值时适合度下降速度的尺度参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量一个量围绕平均值分散程度的指标。

introduced_concepts.name: Population Size
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of individuals or gene copies represented by the population model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Degrees of Freedom
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter controlling the shape of a t or chi-square related distribution.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 控制 t 分布或卡方相关分布形状的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Selection Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter measuring the strength of selection.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量选择强度的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Alpha
introduced_concepts.definition: A model parameter or distribution-shape parameter named alpha in the local context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 alpha 的参数或分布形状参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 27.6a Mean
introduced_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

views.name: Gamma
views.definition: Gamma is the main quantity to read from this equation; the right-hand side shows which terms determine it.
views.definition_zh: Gamma 是这条公式要读出的核心量；等号右侧说明它由哪些条件和符号共同决定。
views.supporting_formula_latex: \gamma=\frac{\sqrt{\nu^{T}\mathbf{S}^{-1}\nu}}{(N\mu)(\widetilde{s}/\widetilde{m})^{-3/2}},\quad\mathrm{w h e r e}\quad\widetilde{s}^{2}=\sqrt[n]{\operatorname{d e t}(\mathbf{S})}\quad\mathrm{a n d}\quad\widetilde{m}^{2}=\sqrt[n]{\operatorname{d e t}(\mathbf{M})}
